Our internal Gemini / ChatGPT for Razorpay

Component code generation with Blade components

tools.name: Devstack Skill
canDo: Automated deployment & debugging for helmfile services via /devstack commands

Ephemeral resource provisioning (Redis, SQS, SNS, etc.)
Commands: /devstack onboard, deploy, debug

canDo: E2E test generation and onboarding automation using LangGraph agent

tools.name: SLIT Agents
canDo: SLIT V2 automated test generation for Go and Python services
72 P0/P1 services adopted
Handed over to Quality team for ownership
tools.state: Active. Handed over to Quality team.

tools.name: E2E Agents
canDo: Can generate end to end scenarios for a service on the following triggers:
PRD / Tech Spec to E2E Scenarios
On PR Diff to E2E Scenarios
On Production Synthetic Test Data
tools.state: 6-Mar: Scenario Gap Coverage MVP Complete. Next: Translate Scenarios into E2E code. Target ETA: 14-Mar. Prod ready by 14-Mar.

tools.name: rCoRe v2
canDo: AI PR reviewer live across all Razorpay private repos (Claude Code based SWE Agent platform)
2.9x more effective than V1 (30.88% acceptance vs 10.66%)
Repo-aware reviews — loads .claude/skills/ to enforce team standards
Inline actionable suggestions with concrete code fixes
Pre-Mortem built-in — DB, Kafka, Redis, circuit breaker checks on every PR
High-severity bug detection at 44.9% acceptance (~4x over V1)
cantDo: rCoRe v2++ improvements in progress (tracked in roadmap)
tools.state: G.A. Live in all private and internal repos.

tools.name: code-review
canDo: Runs on dev's claude code terminal and mimics rCoRe v2 architecture to flag issues
Can be used to plan the fix and resolve comments on GitHub
Flags issues way before PR is raised
tools.state: Active. Local pre-commit review tool. Note: Use rCoRe flow instead.

tools.name: Infra-agent-ready
canDo: Auto discover infra resources of any given application
Create a metadata-infra.md file in the app repo

tools.name: Tejas
canDo: Currently only support AI AWS Cluster deployments
Fully automates application deployment lifecycle — source code to running K8s service using AI-powered multi-agent architecture
Dynamically analyzes code repositories to auto-generate Razorpay-compliant Dockerfiles, GitHub Actions workflows, and Helm charts
Autonomously provisions infrastructure like PostgreSQL databases and AWS resources
Handles DevRev cost approvals and Slack notifications
Enforces security/quality gates with Checkov IaC scans on Terraform and Kubernetes manifests before merging
Orchestrates release via Spinnaker, Credstash secrets injection, built-in recovery to resume or fix failed steps
cantDo: Deploy to RSL and cell accounts

tools.name: Spinnaker MCP
canDo: Generate Canary /Scale / Rotate / Rollback V3 pipelines from natural language
Debug live pipeline failures
Fetch the pipeline and latest execution information if already exists
Cross Region deployment status
cantDo: Onboarding a brand new K8s cluster onto any regional Spinnaker

tools.name: Spinnaker Ops Assistant Skill
canDo: Pipeline generation and operations assistance

tools.name: Spinnaker V3 Pipeline Migrator
canDo: Multi-agent plugin for migrating Spinnaker pipelines from V1/V2 (deploy.razorpay.com) to V3 templated pipelines (deploy-in.razorpay.com) in the Mumbai-RSPL region
cantDo: Prepare V3 pipelines for regions other than Mumbai-RSPL

tools.name: Backend Engineer Plugin
canDo: 5-phase compound engineering workflow: brainstorm > plan > work > review > compound
19 specialized agents (5 research + 7 parallel review + documentation)
Strict TDD enforcement — tests must fail before implementation
Auto-detects Razorpay patterns (goutils, foundation)
Skills: api-proto-design, go-panic-recovery, k8s-debugger, logs-investigator
Commands: /be:brainstorm, /be:plan, /be:work, /be:review, /be:compound, /be:k8s-debug, /be:logs
tools.state: Early version released with Pilot users. Ready for small and medium tasks.

tools.name: Skill Connector
canDo: Skill-connector provides manifest-driven, multi-phase, dependent-execution orchestration
Any workflow that needs 'do A, then B, fan-out to C & D in parallel, gate on E' can be a skill
Take-it-live (code-to-prod) is the first in its umbrella

tools.name: Take-it-live
canDo: Golden path orchestrator for deploying services to production
Lifecycle phases: scaffold, provision, deploy, validate
Archetype scaffolding and policy enforcement

tools.name: Cloud Agents (Vyom)
canDo: Cloud Agents platform (Vyom/SWE-Agent) for automating SDLC workflows
Autonomous agents and context-aware processing
Uses skills from agent-skills repo and repo-level skills on selected repo
DevRev ticket handoff — agent takes over and raises PRs full complete SDLC loop
tools.state: Launched (Beta) - https://vyom.concierge.stage.razorpay.in/. Onboarding lower environment usecases first.

tools.name: Agent Catalog
canDo: Org-wide catalog of autonomous agents, to be used in Cloud Agents
Can be triggered via DevRev, Slack, etc.
Teams contribute agents to agents/ directory, executes headless via claude --agent
Current agent: gng-readiness (Go/No-Go production deployment checks, raises draft fix PRs)

tools.name: Multi-agent Orchestration
